direction_rows.reason: The queue should stay frozen, but now under an explicit reopen protocol rather than an open-ended pause.
No candidate currently clears all three reopen triggers.
The watchlist preserves operational readiness and makes the next reopen auditable instead of discretionary.

interpretation: V1.30J turns the transfer freeze into governance rather than drift.
The research program can now stay paused without losing rigor or visibility into what would legitimately reopen it.
